title: Opening for Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
company: The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners:
The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Coffee Bean India South Asia Partners!
